AD New sofa day

Introducing the Providence sofa from @barkerandstonehouse a piece that completely transformed the space.

From the moment I saw the Providence, it was love at first sight. The timeless design, the detailing, the effortless style, it was exactly the look I had envisioned for our open plan living space.

Comfort was just as important to me as aesthetics, and this sofa truly delivers both. Deep, luxurious, and unbelievably comfortable, the kind of sofa everyone naturally gravitates to.

I love the modular design for its versatility and perfectly tailored feel within the room, alongside the endless fabric options that made the whole process feel so personal and bespoke.

We chose the Tyne Bouclé in Sand, the most beautiful soft neutral that brings warmth and light to the space whilst still feeling practical for everyday living. Finished with matching scatter cushions and additional touches of Ryeland Latte for added texture.

A forever piece, that was made for this space.

#modularsofa #newsofa #britishdesign #interiordesign #openplanliving

New dining chair unboxing 🫶🏻✨🙌🏻

We are redoing our banquette seating area! I haven’t spoken about it in detail on here properly yet but you may have heard me on stories talking about our new cushions that are currently being made. We did the seating area quite quickly just after we’d moved in so that we’d have somewhere to sit and eat after a long day of renovating which was definitely the right call. 
However, now that we’ve been in the house a little while it’s in need of some modifications and a bit of work. We actually have some new plinth on order, someone is coming to sort out our flooring once and for all and James is going to redo the actual bench seating. We’re also going to change the art to something a bit more sympathetic to the space, possibly two stacked frames and I also need to do some painting touch ups. 

So lots going on and lots to look forward to, so I hope you’ll stick around ✨ 

The beautiful new chair is from @barkerandstonehouse and it was a pr gift 🫶🏻

AD Come sofa shopping with me at Barker and Stonehouse.

I’m currently searching for a new sofa. Comfort is the priority, alongside a modular design and a timeless aesthetic that will work beautifully for years to come.

So naturally, I headed @barkerandstonehouse , known for their beautifully curated furniture and focus on quality craftsmanship. With so many stunning designs to choose from, I knew this was going to be a very good day.

What I loved most was how customisable everything felt. From the fabric choices to the different configurations, it really felt like I could create something perfectly suited to my space and style. The staff were so friendly knowledgeable too, talking me through all the options and helping bring my vision to life.

After browsing, I headed up to Chadwick & Co for a bite to eat while I thought over my favourites and made my final decision.

Can you guess which one I chose? There are definitely a few clues throughout…

Ad | Come style my new bedside tables with me.

I shared on my stories recently that I’d been searching for the perfect wooden bedside tables with a marble top, but everything I found was either incredibly expensive or would have needed to be made fully bespoke.

Then I came across these from Barker and Stonehouse, the Tasso fluted mango wood bedside tables with a white marble top, and they’re exactly what I had in mind.

The quality is beautiful. The marble top is solid and weighty, and the whole piece feels really substantial and well made, with that luxurious feel you’d expect at a much higher price point.

They work so well with my new bed and really pull the whole room together. I love the more elevated feel they bring, it has that relaxed hotel, Soho Home style which I always aspire to create on a budget. They’re currently on sale as well.

@barkerandstonehouse #Ad #gifted

The Tasso Dining Table ✨

Clean lines, warm tones, and effortless style - there’s no wonder the Tasso was Izzy’s standout piece on set…

The making of our Spring brochure 🌸

Early starts, endless coffee runs, and just one more shot…

But the real magic? The people behind the camera (and in front of it) bringing every moment to life.

Here’s a little glimpse behind the scenes as our spring story comes together ✨

Our spring brochure has landed 📢
 
Inside you’ll discover our new seasonal looks, designed to inspire every room of your home. From statement living spaces to beautifully considered bedrooms and dining rooms made for entertaining, it’s our most exciting collection yet…
 
And, for the first time, find inside a scratchcard with a guaranteed prize for every customer! Don’t forget to scratch it in store to see what you’ve won🏆
 
Have you got your copy yet?

It all started in 1946 🏠

It’s lovely to mark this moment in time with a nod toward both past and future. But choosing special moments from the last 80 years isn’t at all easy because there have been just so many of them.

So, here are just a handful of highlights with some founder’s faces, some famous faces and some future faces. All are special in their own right and all have and will make their mark on our history.

Happy 80th birthday to us! 🎂

This year, we’re celebrating 80 years of helping customers create homes they love. While our story began eight decades ago, our focus has always been on the here and now and what’s next.

Join us for fizz and more in store on Saturday 28th and Sunday 29th March 2026 as we launch Spring and celebrate our 80th anniversary in style.

Looking for tips on how to sleep better this Christmas? Get ready to upgrade your seasonal sleep routine 🎄✨

The festive season can be magical, but it can also be stressful. Late nights, long to-do lists and busy schedules can make it harder than ever to unwind and fall asleep. From refreshing your mattress to switching on the mood lighting for the perfect Christmas sleep ambience, we’re sharing some simple tips for improving your festive sleep. 

🛏️ Refresh your mattress or add a topper
A good night’s sleep starts with proper support. If your mattress is feeling a little tired, a topper can add instant comfort, extra cushioning and better pressure relief, perfect for unwinding during busy December days.

🌿 Choose natural, breathable bedding
Wool, linen and cotton help regulate your temperature, so you stay warm without overheating. Ideal for cosy winter nights when you want to feel snug but still sleep soundly.

🧣 Layer with cushions and throws
Soft textures add warmth and atmosphere. Try mixing chunky knits with soft-touch fabrics to create a restful, winter-ready cocoon.

💡 Switch to soft, ambient lighting
Warm-toned lamps, fairy lights or dimmable bulbs help signal to your body that it’s time to slow down. A gentle glow can make your bedroom feel instantly more serene.

🧺 Keep your space clutter-free
A clear room really does support a clear mind. Tidying away gifts, wrapping supplies and festive chaos creates a calm environment that helps you unwind before bed.

Goodbye festive stress, hello dreamy Christmas sleep!

#ChristmasSleep #ChristmasSleepTips #ChristmasSleeping

Seventeen Years of Growing Together with Barker & Stonehouse @barkerandstonehouse 🙌😍

In 2008, the same year Trees4Trees was founded, we began a meaningful partnership with Barker & Stonehouse to green the island of Java. 

Seventeen years later, we’re still growing strong, planting more trees and expanding our impact. Thanks to a continued commitment to plant trees and restore ecosystems. 

We’re grateful for this incredible journey and your unwavering support. Together, we’re not just planting trees, we’re helping communities thrive and building a greener, more sustainable future. 

Here’s to planting even more trees in the years ahead! 🌱🌳
